mapper.sql: SELECT P.PLANT_NO , M.MEMBER_NAME , P.PLANT_NAME , P.CLASSIFICATION , P.COUNT , P.CREATE_DATE , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLANT_REVIEW WHERE PLANT_NO = P.PLANT_NO) AS REVIEW_COUNT , COALESCE( (SELECT ROUND(AVG(RATING)) FROM PLANT_REVIEW WHERE PLANT_NO = P.PLANT_NO), 0 ) AS AVG_RATING FROM PLANT P JOIN MEMBER M USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE P.DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: ORDER BY P.PLANT_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

AND (
M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.PLANT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.CLASSIFICATION LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.GROWTH_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
P.PLANT_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%'
( M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.PLANT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.CLASSIFICATION LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.GROWTH_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR P.PLANT_INFO LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' )
) ORDER BY P.PLANT_NO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT P.PLANT_NO , P.PLANT_NAME , P.CLASSIFICATION , P.COUNT , P.CARBON_CAPTURE , P.CREATE_DATE , P.PLANT_INFO , P.GROWTH_INFO , M.MEMBER_ID , P.PLANT_API FROM PLANT P Join MEMBER M USING(MEMBER_NO) WHERE P.PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND P.DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT PLANT_NO FROM PLANT WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} ORDER BY PLANT_NO DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE PLANT SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo}
UPDATE PLANT SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE PLANT_NO = #{plantNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
